Off Calendar Jul-11-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Manda McElrath; 408-947-2448; Hoge Fenton; counsel specially appearing via Zoom for defendant Theodore Timm.
No other appearances.

Counsel for defendant contests the courts tentative ruling and informs the court that parties were properly notified. Discussed. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows:

DEFENDANT THEODORE TIMM MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is GRANTED. Mr. Epis's request to take jurisdictional discovery is DENIED. In order to prevail on a motion for continuance for jurisdictional discovery, the plaintiff should demonstrate that discovery is likely to lead to production of evidence of facts established in jurisdiction and the plaintiff here has not done so.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b)
